title.en: Gradually, the bottleneck of the original rules...

content.en:
With this piece of the Origin Golden Leaf on the other side, Ye Tian's understanding of the Origin Rules of the Other Shore became deeper and deeper.

Gradually, the bottleneck of the original rules on the other side relaxed.

this day.

Airplanes!!!!

The original rules on the other side of cultivation have been broken through, and he has stepped from the ninety percent realm to the ninety percent realm.

Just a little progress, the other side of the origin skyrocketed.

In addition, he has been using various resources to improve his other side origin, and now his other side origin may be very close to 1.5 million!

After stabilizing the realm, Ye Tian went to the Origin Monument on the other side to test it.

1.42 million

"The other side of the origin has made great progress, and I am not far from the cultivation of the Lord of the White Capital!" Ye Tian said excitedly.

In terms of real combat effectiveness, he has already surpassed the Lord of the White Capital.

"With my current strength, in the entire Wind Tooth Island, it is definitely the most powerful Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestor, second only to the four Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors. "

But if such strength is placed in the entire eternal land, it is not worth mentioning.

The years that followed.

Ye Tian has been using various resources to improve his other side of the origin, although the progress is slow, but after a long time, the other side of the origin is still improving little by little.

And his other side Origin Rules are also improving little by little, compared to other Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestors, his progress speed is simply terrifying!

Even the Lord of the White Capital and the Lord of Qingyun were far from his promotion.

...

There are many opportunities for the Origin Black River, and the Innocent Abyss is just an area of the Origin Black River.

Like Ye Tian, he often searched for treasures and opportunities in the Innocent Abyss, but the Lord of the White Capital rarely went to the Innocent Abyss.

this day.

The Lord of the White Capital came to a strange treasure in the Origin Black River, and the Lord of the White Capital named it the True Insect Realm.

The True Insect Realm is like a world, isolated from the water of the Origin Black River, and deep in the bottom of the river somewhere in the interior of the mountain range, very hidden.

If it weren't for an accident, the Lord of the White Capital wouldn't have been able to find this True Worm Realm.

There are many strange insects in the True Worm Realm, and these insects are extremely tough, comparable to the body of the Nine Bone Transformation Realm, and there are many of them.

If it was only the ninth bone transformation realm, the Lord of the White Capital would kill them like killing ants.

But there are still bugs in the True Worm Realm that are comparable to those in the Origin Realm, and these bugs are very difficult to kill, and there are many of them, and there are also bugs comparable to the top Origin Middle Realm.

The Lord of the White Capital has invaded this True Worm Realm many times, but he has not taken it, and each time he is injured and escapes.

If it was an ordinary treasure land, he would ignore it, but this True Insect Realm has a lot of resources, and it also has a treasure that makes him feel excited-the Insect Gold on the other side.

The Insect Gold on the Other Side is a substance secreted by these Origin Realm insects, a resource that has been bred for countless years in the depths of the ground, and for the Heavenly Ancestor of the Origin Realm, it has the effect of strengthening the Origin of the Other Shore, and the effect is too good.

He had snatched a piece of the Worm Gold from the other side before, and he couldn't wait to snatch all the Worm Gold from the other side.

It's a pity that his strength is not good!

After a long time, he still couldn't take down this True Worm Realm, and his strength was difficult to improve for a long time, coupled with the failure of the last attack on the Origin Upper Realm, his confidence was also hit.

"Gotta find a helper!"

The Lord of the White Capital said.

He calculated that the True Worm Realm would not be able to let the Origin Ascendant Realm descend, and he would not go to the Lord of the Wind Fangs and them.

But in fact, if he is allowed to enter, he will not ask the Lord of the Wind Fang for help, otherwise the resources he allocates will definitely be very small, and most of them will have to go to the Lord of the Wind Fang.

"Find a few top-notch Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestors with good strength to help, enter the True Worm Realm together, and allocate some of the resources found to them, it should be fine!"

And he has the right person.

Like the strength of the Lord of Qingyun, it is not his goal.

"The strength of the Lord of Zhenlin is not bad, his strength has improved a little recently, it is enough to rank in the top ten of Fengya Island, and I have a good relationship with him, so let's find him!"

"The Lord of Gu Lin is also not bad, second only to him, he is also one!"

"There is also the Lord of Endless, his strength is the most mysterious, but the strength shown is very strong, maybe the strength is still above me, he is also one!"

Subsequently.

The Lord of the White Capital went to find the Lord of the True Lin, the Lord of the Ancient Lin, and the Lord of the Endless.

The three of them didn't think about it, and they agreed.

After all, why don't they go about the benefits of white gain?

Of course.

They also have to keep it secret and not allow it to be leaked out, otherwise the other island owners will be uncomfortable.

......

Outside the island of Wind Tooth.

A region of origin black river.

The Lord of the White Capital, the Lord of the True Lin, the Lord of the Ancient Forest, and the Lord of the Endless have all arrived.

"Lord of the White Capital!"

"Lord of the White Capital!"

"Lord of the White Capital!"

Ye Tian, the Lord of Zhenlin, and the Lord of Gu Lin shouted one after another.

"Three, I have said the matter before, now go to the True Worm Realm, according to what was originally said, I will harvest one percent of each of you, and the rest will be mine, no opinion, right?" asked the Lord of the White Capital.

"No comments!"

Ye Tian and the Lord of Zhenlin and the Lord of Gu Lin all agreed.

Whew!!!!

They quickly shuttled to the Worm Realm.

The True Worm Realm is still a little far from here, and it still has to pass through the Innocent Abyss, and at the other end of the Innocent Abyss, in the Origin Black River region, it is close to the middle of the land on the other side of eternity.

Afterwards.

They hurried from the bottom of the Heihe River, the origin, and they were also worried about being followed by the origin of the upper realm.

Soon after.

They finally arrived at the entrance to the Worm Realm.

"This is it!"

The Lord of the White Capital pointed to a hole in front of him and said.

At this time, Ye Tian also sensed the fluctuations in the space.

"Let's go inside!"

The four Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestors directly broke into the True Insect Realm.

Soon after entering here, dense insects appeared, and the aura was very powerful.

But for them, these bugs are weak.

"Kill!"

The Lord of the White Capital and the other four all shot and easily killed these insects.

In an instant, all the other bugs fled.

And.

Ye Tian found that these insects were absorbed by the origin of the Genuine Insect Realm after they died.

"The bugs here should multiply very quickly, and if you kill a lot, you will breed a lot. Ye Tian guessed.

"Yes!" the Lord of the White Capital was distressed, "I killed a lot of insects, but after a while, they were bred again. Those insects that are comparable to the top Origin Middle Realm, they take great pains to kill one, and after a long time, another one will appear. We must kill them in one go, so that we can completely occupy the True Worm Realm and collect the resources here. "

"Go directly to the core area of the True Worm Realm and kill all those Origin Realm bugs!"

Ye Tian urged.

"Let's go, go straight to it!"

The lord of the white capital is also quite looking forward to it.
